ddls:
CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the point */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the coordinates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the direction record */,
  "point1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first point (point1) */,
  "point2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second point (point2) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Direction relationship between the two points */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two points */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing between the two points */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of directional relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directions_point1_id FOREIGN KEY ("point1_id") REFERENCES points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES directions_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directions_point2_id FOREIGN KEY ("point2_id") REFERENCES points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship record */,
  "point1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first point in the relationship */,
  "point2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second point in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., proximity, directional) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two points */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing between the two points */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_point1_id FOREIGN KEY ("point1_id") REFERENCES points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_point2_id FOREIGN KEY ("point2_id") REFERENCES points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the analysis */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results from the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., directional, proximity) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being validated */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date validation was performed */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed results or messages from the validation */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validations_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directions_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of direction */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the direction type */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or icon representing the direction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
